description: Log in to Moodle as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!) at http://localhost/moodle. In the "Introduction to Biology" (BIO101) course, configure the gradebook to use the "Weighted mean of grades" aggregation method. Create two grade categories: "Lab Reports" with a weight of 40 and "Exams" with a weight of 60. Ensure the final gradebook configuration reflects these weighted categories.
